/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/tides_cuda_poisson_fft_tests.dir/core/grid/tests/cuda_poisson_fft_tests.cpp.o -o tides_cuda_poisson_fft_tests   -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/stubs  -L/usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12  -Wl,-rpath,/home/niel/src/libxc-7.0.0-install/lib libtides_cuda_grid.a /opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2026.0/lib/libmkl_intel_lp64.so /opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2026.0/lib/libmkl_intel_thread.so /opt/intel/oneapi/mkl/2026.0/lib/libmkl_core.so /opt/intel/oneapi/compiler/2026.0/lib/libiomp5.so -lm -ldl -lm -ldl -lfftw3 /home/niel/src/libxc-7.0.0-install/lib/libxc.so libtides_cuda_tile.a -lcublas -lcufft -lcudadevrt -lcudart
